title: antennaria luzuloides subsp. aberrans
intro: Antennaria luzuloides subsp. aberrans, also known as a subspecies of the perennial Antennaria plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The plant is also known to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Traditionally, Antennaria luzuloides subsp. aberrans is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, salves, and poultices.
